# Atlantis Marketplace

> Atlantis is a B2B wholesale marketplace connecting verified suppliers with business buyers across Europe and the Gulf region. Every supplier is KYC-verified before they can list a single product, and every payment is held in escrow until the buyer confirms delivery. EUR-native pricing, GDPR-compliant, developed by Monjez Company.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.atlantisfmcg.com/): Browse verified wholesale suppliers across FMCG, beverages, electronics, industrial, packaging, automotive, fashion, health, and home categories.
- [About](https://www.atlantisfmcg.com/about): Our mission, KYC verification process, escrow protection, and the Monjez Company team behind Atlantis.
- [Categories](https://www.atlantisfmcg.com/categories): Full product catalog organized by category — FMCG, beverages, snacks, personal care, electronics, industrial goods, and more.
- [How It Works](https://www.atlantisfmcg.com/how-it-works): Step-by-step explanation of how buyers source products and how payments are protected by escrow.
- [Wholesale](https://www.atlantisfmcg.com/wholesale): Bulk pricing tiers, MOQ details, pallet and truck-level orders.
- [Shipping](https://www.atlantisfmcg.com/shipping): Logistics partners, lead times, and delivery zones across Europe and the Gulf.
- [Returns](https://www.atlantisfmcg.com/returns): Return policy and dispute-resolution process protected by escrow.
- [Contact](https://www.atlantisfmcg.com/contact): Reach the Atlantis team — Info@atlantisfmcg.com. Romania · Europe · Gulf.

## Key Facts

- **Business model**: B2B-exclusive wholesale marketplace. No consumer or retail sales.
- **Supplier verification**: Every supplier passes a KYC (Know Your Customer) identity-verification process with liveness detection before listing products.
- **Payment protection**: All payments are held in escrow and released to the supplier only after the buyer confirms delivery.
- **Currency**: EUR-native pricing for the European market. Multi-currency display supported.
- **Tier-based pricing**: Buyers can purchase by carton, pallet, or truck. Each tier has its own markup configurable by the marketplace operator.
- **Primary markets**: Romania, European Union, Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC).
- **Compliance**: GDPR-compliant, AES-256 encryption, 2FA, PCI DSS for card payments.
- **Categories carried**: Beverages, FMCG, snacks, personal care, household goods, electronics, industrial, packaging, automotive, fashion, health, home.
- **Developed by**: Monjez Company.

## What is B2B wholesale sourcing?

B2B wholesale sourcing is the process by which businesses (retailers, distributors, importers) purchase goods in bulk directly from verified suppliers or manufacturers, typically at significantly lower per-unit prices than retail. On Atlantis, buyers select products by carton, pallet, or full truckload; each pricing tier reflects the volume markup. Payments are held in escrow until the buyer confirms delivery, eliminating the trust-gap that has historically slowed cross-border B2B transactions.

## What makes Atlantis different from Alibaba or Faire?

Atlantis is purpose-built for the European and Gulf markets with EUR-native pricing, GDPR compliance from day one, and KYC verification on every supplier — not just self-declared. Unlike global marketplaces that treat the EU as a sub-region, Atlantis is operated under European data-protection law and supports the regulatory and currency expectations of EU buyers as the default.
